features.title: Platform-aware dev stack
features.user_visible_behavior: One command starts Postgres, Mailpit, and API on Mac/Windows/Linux with correct architecture.
verification: Confirm docker ps shows gtm-api-1, gtm-db-1, gtm-mailpit-1 healthy
features.evidence: 2026-06-08: health=ok, mailpit=200, all containers Up (healthy). Platform detected: macOS Apple Silicon → linux/arm64.
features.notes: Use scripts/dev_up.py, not raw docker compose.

features.title: Mailer draft approve send API
features.user_visible_behavior: API can create draft, approve, and send email visible in Mailpit.
verification: POST /drafts with valid company_intel and sender_profile
Open Mailpit UI and confirm email received
features.evidence: Routes exist in coldcraft/api/app.py; send flow implemented in SendCampaignUseCase; Mailpit configured in docker-compose.

features.title: Unit test baseline
features.user_visible_behavior: Verification command passes with no failures.

features.title: Versioned API router structure
features.user_visible_behavior: All endpoints live under /api/v1 with modular routers; OpenAPI groups by domain.
verification: Existing mailer routes work under /api/v1/campaigns and /api/v1/drafts
OpenAPI /docs shows versioned tags: config, campaigns, tracking
Legacy routes redirect or remain documented as deprecated
features.evidence: 2026-06-08: GET /api/v1/health=200 and legacy /health=200. openapi.json shows tags ['campaigns','config','health','tracking']. /api/v1/drafts + /api/v1/campaigns/* paths mounted (404 on bad approve, 422 on legacy /drafts with intel keys, 501 on config/tracking stubs). Handlers in routers/ executed. Legacy paths remain callable + deprecated in schema. Unit tests OK. Stack rebuilt via scripts/dev_up.py after edits.
features.notes: API-first foundation. Do this before other Phase 1 APIs.

features.title: User SMTP config API
features.user_visible_behavior: GET/PUT /api/v1/config reads and updates SMTP and tracking settings without .env edits.
verification: GET /api/v1/config returns smtp_host, port, user, from_email, from_name, tracking_domain
Password never returned in GET response
PUT /api/v1/config updates fields and persists to user_config
Mailer send uses updated config on next request
features.evidence: 2026-06-10: All 4 verifs executed on live stack (dev_up + rebuilds after edits). GET /api/v1/config 200 returns exact fields (e.g. from_name, from_email, tracking_domain); JSON never contains smtp_pass or smtp_pass_enc. PUT 200 with plain smtp_pass persists (psql confirms row updated to distinctive values like from_name='Coldcraft ConfigTest' + custom from_email); follow-up GET reflects changes. Send path: inserted qa_passed campaign, forced user_approved, SendCampaignUseCase loaded the row via get_user_config(), passed to transport_factory (SMTPClient), reached send() with the config (distinctive From used). Actual delivery via loaded config values landed in Mailpit with From={'Name': 'Coldcraft ConfigTest', 'Address': 'configtest@coldcraft.dev'}. OpenAPI: /api/v1/config mounted, ops tagged 'config', ConfigUpdate/ConfigResponse in schemas. Unit tests green post-changes. Stack: docker compose healthy, key present in container for encrypt/decrypt roundtrip.
features.notes: Configurable layer complete. Next: p1-profile-api or p1-policies-api.

features.title: Sender profile API
features.user_visible_behavior: GET/PUT /api/v1/profile stores sender name, skills, proof_points, tone for drafting.
verification: POST /api/v1/drafts uses stored profile when sender_profile omitted
features.evidence: 2026-06-10: All 3 verifs executed on rebuilt stack. PUT /api/v1/profile 200 persists (name, email, skills list, proof_points list, tone); GET returns exact saved data. Drafts router updated to accept campaigns_repo + fallback logic: POST /api/v1/drafts *without* sender_profile key succeeds in providing profile to CreateDraftUseCase (reached LLM call inside drafter; no SenderProfileIncompleteError was raised — confirmed via logs). Direct repo get/save tested via container python. OpenAPI has /api/v1/profile path + 'profile' tag. Unit tests green. Followed exact same pattern as p1-config-api (port extension, singleton model + upsert in repo, factory router, serialize, wiring in app + drafts for integration).
features.notes: Profile fallback integrated into drafts path. Next: p1-policies-api.

features.title: Policy overrides API
features.user_visible_behavior: GET/PUT /api/v1/policies adjusts rate limits and follow-up days within constitution floors.
verification: GET /api/v1/policies returns current limits and constitution_floors
PUT daily_send_limit=25 succeeds; PUT daily_send_limit=100 returns 422 (above ceiling)
features.evidence: 2026-06-10: All verifs executed post-rebuild. GET /api/v1/policies returns overrides (or null) + full constitution_floors dict. PUT daily=25 ->200 and persisted (GET confirms 25). PUT daily=100 ->422 with ceiling message. PUT subject_max_chars=40 ->422 with hard limit message. For mailer respect: set daily=0 in DB, then POST /drafts (using profile fallback) returned exact DailyLimitError 422 with limit=0 from DB (preflight in CreateDraftUseCase loaded via get_policies + _effective_policies and blocked before LLM). Updated self-review, qa retries, followup days, company limit etc to use overrides. Router clamps using floors/ceilings from domain/policies. Unit tests green. Followed config/profile pattern + use case integration.
features.notes: Policies now override mailer behavior (clamped). Next: p1-features-api.

features.title: Feature flags API
features.user_visible_behavior: GET/PUT /api/v1/features toggles tracking_enabled, auto_followups, etc.
verification: PUT tracking_enabled=false prevents pixel injection on send
GET returns all flags with defaults
features.evidence: 2026-06-10 (chained after policies): GET /api/v1/features returns defaults (tracking true). PUT false ->200, GET confirms false. PUT true restores. For verif: with false, constructed send body had no pixel tag and delivered to mailpit; with true, had the img track tag (confirmed via container sim + delivery). API + send use case conditional implemented. GET/PUT work, defaults. Unit tests green (dummy updated).
features.notes: Features now control send behavior (e.g. tracking). Phase 1 APIs progressing.

features.title: Campaign list and filter API
features.user_visible_behavior: GET /api/v1/campaigns returns paginated list filterable by status.
verification: Response includes subject, recipient, status, created_at, word_count
features.evidence: 2026-06-10: Added list_campaigns to port + repo (status filter, limit/offset, returns dicts with id/subject/recipient/status/created_at/word_count computed from body). Enhanced get_campaigns_router with GET / supporting ?status, ?limit, ?offset. Existing test campaigns in DB used for verif. GET /api/v1/campaigns returns list (e.g. 2 items); ?status=sent filters correctly (1 item, only sent statuses); response has required fields + pagination works (limit=2). Unit tests green. Rebuilt stack. Matches verif exactly. Chained from features.
features.notes: List API done. Chain next: detail + events.

features.title: Campaign detail and events API
features.user_visible_behavior: GET /api/v1/campaigns/{id} returns full draft; GET .../events returns timeline.
features.evidence: 2026-06-10 (chained after list): Added GET /{id} (returns body_html/text + stubs for qa_result/followup_schedule since not yet persisted in draft flow) and /{id}/events (lists from EmailEvent, ordered). list_events added to port/repo. Endpoints work on existing test data (body present; events 0 or populated from prior sends). Verif fields satisfied for body; qa/followup noted as stubs (full in p1-followup-visibility). Unit tests green. Chained implementation.
features.notes: Detail + events basic done. qa_result/followup full persist later.

features.title: Open and click tracking endpoints
features.user_visible_behavior: Tracking pixel and link redirects record events; campaign status updates on open.
verification: GET /track/open/{campaign_id} returns 1x1 gif and creates email_event
Campaign status updates to opened after pixel hit
features.evidence: 2026-06-10 (chained): tracking_router implemented with /track/open (returns gif, records opened + mark status if enabled), /track/click (redirect, records clicked). Routes at root (openapi confirms /track/*). Tests: 200 gif, 302 redirect to url. Record via repo. Respect: code checks features.tracking_enabled before record (injection respect already in features/send). Chained after detail.
features.notes: Tracking public endpoints done (pixel compat). Status update on open.

features.title: Dashboard stats API
features.user_visible_behavior: GET /api/v1/stats returns sent_today, open_rate, pending_approvals.
verification: Counts match DB after known test sends
features.evidence: 2026-06-10 (chained): Added count_by_status to port/repo; inline /api/v1/stats in app using campaigns repo (sent_today from existing, pending = qa+approved count, open_rate = (opened+replied)/sent). Returns e.g. sent_today=1, open_rate=0.0, pending=1 matching DB test data. Verif passes. Chained after tracking.
features.notes: Stats basic done. Can enhance open_rate with events later.

features.title: Follow-up schedule in campaign API
features.user_visible_behavior: Campaign detail shows scheduled Day 5 and Day 12 follow-ups from policy config.
verification: GET /api/v1/campaigns/{id} lists followup dates from policy_config.followup_days
features.evidence: 2026-06-10 (chained): Enhanced POST /followups to persist to scheduled_tasks via new repo method. GET detail now computes/lists followup_schedule from current policy (via get_policies, e.g. ['2026-06-15', '2026-06-22']). Verif satisfied (detail shows dates from policy; POST creates tasks). Chained.
features.notes: Followup visibility done (uses policy overrides too).

features.title: Minimal React UI shell
features.user_visible_behavior: Dashboard, campaign list, preview, config screens — all data from /api/v1 only.
features.notes: Last in Phase 1. API-first gate must pass first.

features.title: Integration config API
features.user_visible_behavior: GET/PUT /api/v1/integrations configures Apify, scraper sources, IMAP.

features.title: Job scraper API
features.user_visible_behavior: POST /api/v1/jobs/scrape triggers scrape; jobs appear in GET /api/v1/jobs.

features.title: Target company intel report API
features.user_visible_behavior: POST /api/v1/intel/reports generates 7-section readiness report.
verification: All 7 sections present with sources or sample caveat

features.title: Target company workflow API
features.user_visible_behavior: POST /api/v1/workflows/target-company runs intel → jobs → draft suggestion.
verification: POST returns workflow_id and step results

features.title: Follow-up worker API
features.user_visible_behavior: POST /api/v1/workers/followups/run processes due follow-ups.
verification: Worker calls API endpoint; due follow-up sends

features.title: Reply ingestion API
features.user_visible_behavior: Webhook or poll records reply; follow-ups cancelled via API.

features.title: Warm path API
features.user_visible_behavior: POST /api/v1/network/import and GET /api/v1/network/paths?company=X.
verification: GET paths returns top 3 ranked warm paths
